section.heading: Electronic transfer

content.p: The Secretary shall transfer funds in accordance with this subchapter through electronic transfer as soon as practicable after April 4, 1996.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 87–128, title III, § 381N, as added Pub. L. 104–127, title VII, § 761, Apr. 4, 1996, 110 Stat. 1147.)
